<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE score-partwise  PUBLIC "-//Recordare//DTD MusicXML 4.0 Partwise//EN" "http://www.musicxml.org/dtds/partwise.dtd">
<score-partwise version="4.0">
  <movement-title>Music21 Fragment</movement-title>
  <identification>
    <creator type="composer">Music21</creator>
    <encoding>
      <encoding-date>2026-07-06</encoding-date>
      <software>music21 v.10.3.0</software>
      <supports element="beam" type="yes" />
      <supports element="stem" type="yes" />
      <supports element="accidental" type="yes" />
    </encoding>
  </identification>
  <defaults>
    <scaling>
      <millimeters>7</millimeters>
      <tenths>40</tenths>
    </scaling>
  </defaults>
  <part-list>
    <score-part id="P4b43e3d24920649d26ca343f07936ba7">
      <part-name />
    </score-part>
  </part-list>
  <!--=========================== Part 1 ===========================-->
  <part id="P4b43e3d24920649d26ca343f07936ba7">
    <!--========================= Measure 1 ==========================-->
    <measure implicit="no" number="1">
      <attributes>
        <divisions>10080</divisions>
        <time>
          <beats>4</beats>
          <beat-type>4</beat-type>
        </time>
        <clef>
          <sign>F</sign>
          <line>4</line>
        </clef>
      </attributes>
      <harmony>
        <root>
          <root-step>C</root-step>
        </root>
        <kind>major</kind>
      </harmony>
    </measure>
    <!--========================= Measure 2 ==========================-->
    <measure implicit="no" number="2">
      <harmony>
        <root>
          <root-step>F</root-step>
        </root>
        <kind>major</kind>
      </harmony>
    </measure>
    <!--========================= Measure 3 ==========================-->
    <measure implicit="no" number="3">
      <harmony>
        <root>
          <root-step>C</root-step>
        </root>
        <kind>major</kind>
      </harmony>
    </measure>
    <!--========================= Measure 4 ==========================-->
    <measure implicit="no" number="4">
      <harmony>
        <root>
          <root-step>F</root-step>
        </root>
        <kind>minor-seventh</kind>
      </harmony>
    </measure>
    <!--========================= Measure 5 ==========================-->
    <measure implicit="no" number="5">
      <harmony>
        <root>
          <root-step>B</root-step>
        </root>
        <kind>major</kind>
        <degree>
          <degree-value>7</degree-value>
          <degree-alter>-1</degree-alter>
          <degree-type>add</degree-type>
        </degree>
      </harmony>
    </measure>
    <!--========================= Measure 6 ==========================-->
    <measure implicit="no" number="6">
      <harmony>
        <root>
          <root-step>C</root-step>
        </root>
        <kind>major</kind>
      </harmony>
    </measure>
    <!--========================= Measure 7 ==========================-->
    <measure implicit="no" number="7">
      <harmony>
        <root>
          <root-step>A</root-step>
        </root>
        <kind>dominant</kind>
      </harmony>
    </measure>
    <!--========================= Measure 8 ==========================-->
    <measure implicit="no" number="8">
      <harmony>
        <root>
          <root-step>D</root-step>
        </root>
        <kind>minor-seventh</kind>
      </harmony>
    </measure>
    <!--========================= Measure 9 ==========================-->
    <measure implicit="no" number="9">
      <harmony>
        <root>
          <root-step>G</root-step>
        </root>
        <kind>dominant</kind>
      </harmony>
    </measure>
    <!--========================= Measure 10 =========================-->
    <measure implicit="no" number="10">
      <harmony>
        <root>
          <root-step>C</root-step>
        </root>
        <kind>major</kind>
      </harmony>
      <barline location="right">
        <bar-style>light-heavy</bar-style>
      </barline>
    </measure>
  </part>
</score-partwise>

  </part-list>

    <!--========================= Measure 1 ==========================-->

      <attributes>
        <divisions>10080</divisions>
        <time>
          <beats>4</beats>
          <beat-type>4</beat-type>
        </time>
        <clef>
          <sign>F</sign>
          <line>4</line>
        </clef>
      </attributes>
      <harmony>
        <root>
          <root-step>D</root-step>
        </root>
        <kind>minor-seventh</kind>
      </harmony>
    </measure>
    <!--========================= Measure 2 ==========================-->
    <measure implicit="no" number="2">
      <harmony>
        <root>
          <root-step>G</root-step>
        </root>
        <kind>dominant</kind>

    </measure>
    <!--========================= Measure 3 ==========================-->

      <harmony>
        <root>
          <root-step>C</root-step>
        </root>
        <kind>major-seventh</kind>

    </measure>
    <!--========================= Measure 4 ==========================-->

        <root>
          <root-step>A</root-step>

        <kind>dominant</kind>

    <!--========================= Measure 5 ==========================-->

          <root-step>D</root-step>

        <kind>minor-seventh</kind>
      </harmony>

      </barline>
